extraction.one_line_summary: LAPORTE Christophe won after Jumbo-Visma drove final climb at 8km out, splitting peloton and delivering 1-2-3 with Roglic and Van Aert, gapping GC contenders by 30 seconds.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma converted crosswind anxiety into climb aggression: Teunissen/Hofstede paced at 60kph then Laporte split field at 8km climb.
INEOS Grenadiers positioned defensively for crosswinds but failed to respond when Jumbo converted threat into climbing selection instead.
GC riders Quintana/Yates dropped on minor climb when pace hit 60kph, revealing hilly opener vulnerability despite sprinter expectations.

rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: negative: dropped on minor final climb at 8km, unexpected weakness for rider contesting stage
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Max: negative: defending champion lost 22 seconds in third group, poor positioning when Jumbo accelerated
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: nearly won 2021 Paris-Nice, took 6 bonus seconds in second, Jumbo sacrificed his win for Laporte team morale
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: positive: new Jumbo signing did final climb pull that created 30-second gap then gifted stage win
rider_signals.STEWART Campbell: negative: crashed at 15km allowing Jumbo to exploit reduced numbers in leadout phase
